questionHtml: Identify one adaptation of the leaf for the absorption of light visible in this micrograph.
markschemeHtml:
1.  double layer of palisade cells;
  2.  palisade layer on upper surface;
  3.  dimensions of palisade cells maximize light absorption;
  4.  thin/transparent epidermis/cuticle;

meta.title: Identify one adaptation of the leaf for the absorption of light visible in this micrograph.
